_comment: Hand-authored fixture for loader unit tests. Structurally identical to the real LongMemEval-S and LoCoMo JSON schemas, but the content is invented — this is NOT real benchmark data.

longmemeval.question: What city does the user live in now?

haystack_sessions.content: I just moved to Porto last month.
Porto is lovely — congratulations on the move!
Update: I relocated again, I live in Lisbon now.

longmemeval.question: What is the user's favorite opera?
longmemeval.answer: The user never mentioned a favorite opera.

haystack_sessions.content: Hiking is a great way to unwind.

session_1.speaker: Maya
session_1.text: I adopted a beagle named Waffles last week.

session_1.speaker: Tom
session_1.text: That's wonderful! I started pottery classes.

session_2.speaker: Maya
session_2.text: Waffles chewed through my pottery mug, ironically.

session_2.speaker: Tom
session_2.text: Ha! I can make you a new one in class.

qa.question: What is the name of Maya's dog and who offered to replace her mug?
qa.answer: Waffles; Tom offered to make a new mug

qa.question: When did Maya adopt her dog?
